password reset done.title: Password Reset
password reset done.description: Wow! Your account is already linked (`{ign}`). Staff will reset your password within 1-3 days.

instructions.title: Still Not Linked
instructions.description:
We couldn't detect a link yet. Please try these steps again:

1. Join the [main Discord server](https://discord.gg/mysticraft) if you haven't already
2. Use `/link` in any gamemodes to get a code
3. DM the **4-digit code** to the corresponding Discord bot.

password reset ask login.title: Password Reset Verification
password reset ask login.description: Can you currently log into the Minecraft server with this account?

password reset can login.title: Password Reset (Linking Instructions)
password reset can login.description:
1. Join the [main Discord server](https://discord.gg/mysticraft) if you haven't already
2. Use `/link` in any gamemodes (Lifesteal/Practice/Survival/Vanilla) to get a code
3. DM the **4-digit code** to the corresponding Discord bot.
4. Once linked, staff will reset your password within 1-3 days.

password reset cannot login.title: Password Reset
password reset cannot login.description: Unfortunately, verification is impossible without a prior link to your account. Please continue to play on MystiCraft with an alt account.

other questions.title: Server Questions
other questions.description: Choose a topic that you need help with. If you have a question not listed here, select **Other Questions**.

how to link.title: How to Link Your Account
how to link.description:
1. Join the [main Discord server](https://discord.gg/mysticraft) if you haven't already
2. Use `/link` in any gamemodes (Lifesteal/Practice/Survival/Vanilla) to get a code
3. DM the **4-digit code** to the corresponding Discord bot.
4. Kaboom! You are now successfully linked!

switch from cracked to premium.title: Switching from Cracked to Premium
switch from cracked to premium.description:
Log in with your cracked account, run `/premium <yourpassword>`, log out, then log back in with your premium account.

Your premium account must have the **exact same username** as your cracked account, and the cracked account will no longer be used after migration.

other issues.title: Other Questions or Issues
other issues.description: Are you reporting a player/staff member, reporting a bug, or appealing for a punishment?

other issues yes.title: Wrong Category
other issues yes.description: You created the wrong type of ticket. Please close this ticket and create a new ticket with the correct category in <#1373881299651268710>.

modal.title: Server Question
fields: What would you like to ask?
modal.result_description: Thanks! Staff will review your question shortly.

billing support.title: Billing Support
billing support.description: Choose the billing issue that best matches your request.

buttons.label: I want to request a refund
I want to transfer a rank

modal.title: Billing Support
modal.result_description: Thanks! Staff will review your billing request shortly.

modal.title: Billing Support
modal.result_description: Thanks! Staff will review your billing request shortly.

punishment appeals.title: Punishment Appeal
punishment appeals.description: Choose the appeal type that matches your case. Be sincere and talk about how you were unfairly punished or deserve a second chance.

modal.title: Minecraft Appeal
fields: Reason or ID of the punishment
Why should the punishment be removed?
modal.result_description: Your appeal has been submitted. Staff will review it shortly. We do not guarantee that we will accept your appeal. Our decision is final (meaning you cannot appeal your appeal decision), and you can appeal again in 14 days if it is rejected.

modal.title: Discord Appeal
fields: Why should the punishment be removed?
modal.result_description: Your appeal has been submitted. Staff will review it shortly. We do not guarantee that we will accept your appeal. Our decision is final (meaning you cannot appeal your appeal decision), and you can appeal again in 14 days if it is rejected.

punishment appeal friend.title: Appeal Rejected
punishment appeal friend.description: We do not process appeals initiated for other people.

player reports.title: Player Report
player reports.description: Choose the type of behaviour you want to report.

player report cheat.title: Player Report (Cheating)
player report cheat.description: Do you have clear video evidence?

modal.title: Player Report
modal.result_description: Thanks! Staff will review the report shortly. Whether or not we take action is up to the discretion of our staff.

player report cheat no video.title: Player Report
player report cheat no video.description: Unfortunately, without video proof we cannot take action against any players. Please try to screen record future encounters.

player report chat.title: Player Report (Chat Misbehavior)
player report chat.description: Unfortunately, our time window for chat punishments is 5 minutes, meaning moderators are only allowed to take action on chat misbehaviour that occurred in the last 5 minutes. By the time you created a ticket and a moderator comes online, that window has likely passed. Therefore, **we won't process chat reports in tickets.** Next time, you are encouraged to use the `/report` command in-game to send moderators a notification so we can take action immediately.

bug/glitch reports.title: Bug / Glitch Report
bug/glitch reports.description: Do you have clear video evidence?

bug video.title: Bug / Glitch Report
bug video.description: Choose the kind of bug report you are submitting.

buttons.label: Lost items due to a bug
Lost items due to lag / combat log

bug no video.title: Bug / Glitch Report
bug no video.description: Without video proof or reproduction steps, we cannot fix bugs or restore items.

modal.title: Bug Report
fields: Describe the bug and how to reproduce it
Link to Video Proof of Bug
modal.result_description: Thanks! Our owner will review the bug report shortly.

modal.title: Bug / Item Loss
fields: Describe the bug and how to reproduce it
Link to Video Proof of Bug
modal.result_description: Thanks! Our owner will review the bug report shortly.

bug lag.title: Bug / Glitch Report
bug lag.description: Sorry, we do not restore items lost to lag, despawns, or combat disconnects.

staff reports.title: Staff Report
staff reports.description: Do you have proof of the staff member's behaviour (screenshots/videos)?

modal.title: Staff Report
modal.result_description: Thanks! Our managers and owners will review the report shortly.

staff proof no.title: Staff Report
staff proof no.description: Unfortunately, we cannot investigate any staff report without concrete evidence and proof.

tier migration.title: Tier Migration
tier migration.description: Please select the Minecraft server you want to migrate your tiers from:

migration server ok mctiers.title: Tier Migration Request
migration server ok mctiers.description: **Please forward your results message from the MC Tiers Discord server to this ticket as proof!** Without proof, we cannot process your migration request.

migration server ok pvptiers.title: Tier Migration Request
migration server ok pvptiers.description: **Please forward your results message from the PvP Tiers Discord server to this ticket as proof!** Without proof, we cannot process your migration request.

migration no.title: Tierlist Not Supported
migration no.description: Unfortunately, we do not support migrations from other tierlists at this time.

account/tier transfer.title: Account, Tiers, or Roles Transfers
account/tier transfer.description: Please select the specific issue you are experiencing with your linked accounts, tiers, or roles:

buttons.label: My tiers on the website are missing
My tier roles on Discord are missing
I need to transfer my old tiers

modal.title: Missing Website Tiers
fields: What is your Minecraft in-game name?
Which tiers are currently missing from the website?
modal.result_description: Thank you! Our team will review your request and update your tiers accordingly if applicable.

modal.title: Missing Discord Tier Roles
fields: What is your Minecraft in-game name?
Which tier roles are missing on your Discord profile?
modal.result_description: Thank you! Our team will review your request and update your Discord roles accordingly if applicable.

transfer tier.title: Tier Transfer Options
transfer tier.description: Please select the type of transfer migration you need for your existing tiers:

buttons.label: I need to transfer my tiers to a new Minecraft account
I need to change my Minecraft username
I need to transfer my tiers to a new Discord account

modal.title: Minecraft Account Tier Transfer
fields: What is your old Minecraft username?
What is your new Minecraft username?
modal.result_description:
Thank you! Our team will review your request and transfer your tiers to the new account if applicable.

**You can speed up the process by linking your new Minecraft account to Discord (<#1460525451368861818>) if you haven't already.**

modal.title: Minecraft Username Change Sync
modal.result_description:
Thank you! Our team will review your request and update your tier listings to match your new username if applicable.

**You can speed up the process by linking your renamed Minecraft account again to Discord (<#1460525451368861818>) if you haven't already.**

modal.title: Discord Account Transfer
fields: What is your old Discord username or ID?
What is your new Discord username or ID?
modal.result_description:
Thank you! Our team will review your request and transfer your Discord roles to the new account if applicable.

**You can speed up the process by linking your existing Minecraft account to the new Discord account (<#1460525451368861818>) if you haven't already.**

general support.title: General Support
general support.description: Select the option that best matches your support inquiry:

buttons.label: I have an issue with my HT3 testing
My tester gave me an unfair rank
I want to appeal my punishment
I want to report a bug/glitch
I want to reset my password

when test.title: Waitlist Instructions
when test.description:
After you've joined a waitlist at <#1304842299376799857>, you are not immediately going to be tested. The queue will be open whenever a tester for your region becomes available, and **we don't know when that will be**. Please be patient!

When a tester for this region becomes available, you will be pinged with a button to join a queue to be tested. If no testers are available, the queue remains closed and you will not see the button until a tester has opened the queue.

ht3 issue.title: High Tier 3 (HT3) Support
ht3 issue.description: Select the option that matches your concern:

buttons.label: I cannot join the HT3 waitlist
My assigned tester is not responding

modal.title: HT3 Waitlist Issue
fields: Which gamemode are you facing issues with?
Describe the exact issue you are encountering
modal.result_description: Thank you! Staff will assist you shortly.

modal.title: Tester Not Responding
fields: Provide your original testing ticket link
modal.result_description: Thank you! Staff will look into this and get back to you shortly.

unfair rank.title: Test Decisions Policy
unfair rank.description: All rank placements and evaluations are entirely up to the tester's professional discretion. Tester decisions are final and are not open to disputes on the tier given.

support server appeal.title: Wrong Server
support server appeal.description: This is not the correct server for punishment appeals. No staff member can assist you here. For punishment appeals, bug reports, or password issues, please head over to our support server (https://discord.gg/W735Rtgy4D) and create a ticket there with the correct category.

support server bug.title: Wrong Server
support server bug.description: This is not the correct server for bug reports. No staff member can assist you here. For punishment appeals, bug reports, or password issues, please head over to our support server (https://discord.gg/W735Rtgy4D) and create a ticket there with the correct category.

support server password.title: Wrong Server
support server password.description: This is not the correct server for password resets. No staff member can assist you here. For punishment appeals, bug reports, or password issues, please head over to our support server (https://discord.gg/W735Rtgy4D) and create a ticket there with the correct category.

modal.title: Support Inquiry
fields: What is your in-game name? (If applicable)
Please explain your issue or question in detail
modal.result_description: Thanks! Staff will assist you shortly.
